Player One · Bio

DUVAL SAINT

Street artist, muralist and streetwear designer born and based in Jacksonville, FL. What started as tags on a skateboard turned into a full-blown label and a wall-painting practice repping the 904 everywhere it goes.

Instagram @duval.saintTikTok @duval.saintYouTube DUVAL SAINT
PORTRAIT // SWAP PHOTO
Est. Jacksonville◆Repping the 904◆Aerosol & pixels◆Est. Jacksonville◆Repping the 904◆Aerosol & pixels◆

The Origin Story

Every artist has a Level 1. Ours starts with a busted skateboard, a fistful of paint markers, and a stretch of concrete that needed color. Fast-forward through a decade of legal walls, gallery shows, and sold-out drops, and the mission hasn't changed: put Jacksonville on the map, one wall and one garment at a time.

The work fuses graffiti fundamentals with the arcade and video-game imagery of a '90s childhood — pixel fire, coin-slot halos, leaderboard sunsets. It's nostalgic, it's loud, and it's unmistakably Duval.

"Paint the city you want to live in."

  1. 2016

    First Legal Wall

    A rattle-can halo in Murray Hill kicks it all off.

  2. 2019

    The 904 Collective

    Curating block parties and group walls across Duval.

  3. 2022

    First Streetwear Drop

    Box-logo tees sell out in a weekend at a Riverside pop-up.

  4. 2024

    Concrete Jungle

    A 40-foot commissioned mural anchors the Riverside arts district.
